description: 3 pitch templates + 3 subject lines for mortgage affordability widget outreach
phase: Phase 11 — DO NOT SEND until approved
embed_code: <iframe src="https://www.qfinhub.com/embed/mortgage-affordability" width="100%" height="650" style="border:0;max-width:100%;" loading="lazy" title="Mortgage Affordability Calculator"></iframe>
key_selling_points: 100% free — no signup, no paid tiers
No user data collected — all calculations in browser
Mobile responsive — works on all devices
Clean design that blends with any site
Live preview available on the widget page

pitches.name: Value-Add Pitch (blogs, resource pages)
subject_lines: Free mortgage affordability calculator for your readers
Quick question: do your readers know how much house they can afford?
Free embeddable tool for your homebuying guide
pitches.body:
Hi [NAME],

I came across your [article/page] on [TOPIC] and thought your readers would find this useful.

I built a free mortgage affordability calculator widget that you can embed on your site. It helps readers instantly figure out how much house they can afford based on their income, debts, and down payment — using standard 28%/36% DTI lending guidelines.

It's 100% free, no signup required, and doesn't collect any user data. Just copy and paste one line of HTML:

[EMBED CODE]

Live preview: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

Let me know if you have any questions or need help embedding it.

Best,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB

pitches.name: Professional Tool Pitch (agents, brokers, lenders)
subject_lines: Free tool to pre-qualify your homebuyer leads
Help your clients figure out their budget before they apply
Mortgage affordability widget for your website — free
pitches.body:
Hi [NAME],

I noticed your site helps [homebuyers/clients] with [mortgages/finding homes]. I wanted to share a free tool that might save you and your clients time.

It's a mortgage affordability calculator widget that your visitors can use directly on your site. They input their income, debts, and down payment — and it instantly shows their affordable home price, max loan amount, and DTI breakdown.

Key details:
• 100% free, no signup
• No client data collected (all in-browser)
• Mobile responsive
• Clean, professional design

Embed code:
[EMBED CODE]

Live demo: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

Happy to help with any questions.

Best,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB

pitches.name: Educational Resource Pitch (edu, gov, nonprofits)
subject_lines: Free interactive DTI calculator for your financial literacy resources
Hands-on tool for teaching home affordability
Free widget: teach DTI ratios with real numbers
pitches.body:
Hi [NAME],

I'm reaching out because of your work in [financial literacy / housing education / community resources].

I've built a free, interactive mortgage affordability calculator that could be a useful hands-on tool for your [students / clients / community members]. It lets people adjust income, debt, and down payment in real time and see exactly how lenders calculate affordability using standard DTI ratios.

It's entirely free, no registration, no data collection — just a clean embeddable widget:

[EMBED CODE]

You can see it in action here: https://www.qfinhub.com/widgets/mortgage-affordability-embed

I built this as a public resource — no catch, no upsell. If you think it would be useful for your audience, I'd be honored to have it on your site.

Thanks for your time,
Qasem Mohammed
QFINHUB
